Short Description: Braised Short Ribs with a Balsamic Fig Glaze and Caramelized Pearl Onions and Roasted Wild Mushrooms over Roasted Baby Potatoes
Long Description: Tender braised short ribs finished with a sweet balsamic fig glaze, served with caramelized pearl onions and roasted wild mushrooms over roasted baby potatoes for a rich, French-inspired plate with a bold, savory finish.

Short Description: Peri Peri Chicken with a Peri Peri Glaze and Fire Roasted Sweet Corn and Saffron Roasted Cauliflower over Turmeric Rice
Long Description: Bold peri peri chicken finished with a peri peri glaze, served with fire roasted sweet corn and saffron roasted cauliflower over turmeric rice for a vibrant, layered plate with a warm and savory finish.

Short Description: Lemon Herb Chicken with a Roasted Red Pepper and Pomegranate Whipped Feta and Sautéed Lacinato Kale and Roasted Bell Peppers and Pickled Cucumbers over Roasted Sweet Potatoes
Long Description: Lemon herb roasted chicken breast served over a smoky roasted red pepper and pomegranate whipped feta with sautéed lacinato kale, roasted bell peppers, and quick-pickled cucumbers over roasted sweet potatoes for a bright, sun-warmed plate with a sweet, smoky finish.

Short Description: Cast Iron Steak with a Chimichurri and Roasted Sweet Plantains and Pickled Red Onions over Cilantro Lime Rice
Long Description: Marinated skirt steak seared in cast iron and finished with butter, garlic, and thyme, sliced and served with a bright Argentine chimichurri, roasted sweet plantains, and pickled red onions over cilantro lime rice for a vibrant, steakhouse-inspired plate with a fresh, herbaceous finish.

Short Description: Pan Seared Salmon with a Tahini Green Goddess Dressing and Sautéed Lacinato Kale and Roasted Golden Beets and Pickled Red Onion over Apricot Farro
Long Description: Pan seared salmon finished with a creamy, herbal tahini green goddess dressing, served with sautéed lacinato kale, roasted golden beets, and pickled red onion over apricot farro for a fresh, garden-forward plate with a nutty, sun-ripened finish.

Short Description: Garlic Butter Shrimp with a Lemon Garlic Butter Emulsion and Roasted Cauliflower and Roasted Zucchini over Orzo Pasta
Long Description: Tender garlic butter shrimp finished with a lemon garlic butter emulsion, served with roasted cauliflower and roasted zucchini over orzo pasta for a bright, buttery seafood plate with a smooth, savory finish.

Short Description: Beef Bolognese with a Rich Tomato Sofrito Sauce over Pappardelle
Long Description: Slow-simmered ground beef bolognese with a rich tomato sofrito sauce, served over pappardelle for a hearty, classic Italian plate with a deep, comforting finish.

Short Description: Oven Roasted Tofu in a Thai Coconut Curry with Roasted Bell Peppers and Roasted Broccoli over Jasmine Rice
Long Description: Oven roasted tofu in a rich Thai coconut curry, served with roasted bell peppers, roasted broccoli, and shredded purple cabbage over fluffy jasmine rice for a warm, fragrant plate with a creamy, aromatic finish.

Short Description: A dense high protein and collagen rich ginger miso bone broth slow simmered for 24 hours
Long Description: A dense, high protein, and collagen rich ginger miso bone broth slow simmered for 24 hours with fresh ginger, white miso, and warming spices.

Short Description: Clarified lemon ginger bone broth with sea salt, white pepper, and fresh herbs. Designed for daily sipping, warm or chilled.
Long Description: Our lightest bone broth yet. A clarified lemon ginger bone broth with sea salt, white pepper, and fresh herbs, designed for daily sipping, warm or chilled.

Short Description: Chocolate overnight oats with fresh raspberries
Long Description: Premium rolled oats steeped overnight in organic milk with rich cocoa, lightly sweetened with organic maple syrup. Topped with fresh raspberries.

Short Description: Vanilla chia pudding with fresh blackberries and blueberries
Long Description: A creamy vanilla chia pudding sweetened with maple syrup and topped with fresh blackberries and blueberries.

Short Description: Tiramisu chia pudding with a sweet tiramisu style cream topped with a light cocoa dusting
Long Description: Creamy vanilla chia pudding layered with a lightly sweet tiramisu style cream, finished with a light cocoa dusting for a rich, dessert inspired treat.

Short Description: Four 2oz wellness shots: Immunity, Endurance, Purify, Clarity
Long Description: Bundle of four 2oz wellness shots — Immunity, Endurance, Purify, and Clarity — cold-pressed daily and made with fresh ginger, turmeric, lemon, and seasonal botanicals.

Short Description: A box of 5 date balls in 3 flavors
Long Description: A curated box of 5 date balls in 3 signature flavors — each bite a dense, naturally sweetened blend of dates, seeds, and seasonal spices, designed as the perfect on-the-go snack.
